title: clianthus speciosus
intro: Clianthus speciosus, also known as the kowhai or New Zealand pea, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Clianthus speciosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
